name: part_002
file: tmp_【重大告知あり】新３Dお披露目？！癒月ちょこ生誕祭2026🎂 【ホロライブ⧸癒月ちょこ】 [_1PGuuEP7ps]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_002.webm

scenes.description: Choco, Noel, and Lamy discuss the studio setup and the upcoming photo session.
Choco hands a camera to Lamy and a 'mosaic stick' to Noel to prepare for the shoot.
The photo session begins, featuring various poses including a tribute to Kiryu Coco.

subtitles.original: 可愛い！
subtitles.english: So cute!

subtitles.original: ね、可愛い！
subtitles.english: Right? So cute!

subtitles.original: でしょう、でしょう！
subtitles.english: Right, right?!

subtitles.original: でもさ、診察室だけど...
subtitles.english: But wait, this is a clinic, but...

subtitles.original: ベッドは？ベッドどこ？
subtitles.english: Where's the bed? Where is it?

subtitles.original: あれ？あ、本当だ。
subtitles.english: Oh? Ah, you're right.

subtitles.original: なんかパネルもあれ？
subtitles.english: What's with that panel too?

subtitles.original: あれ使う？
subtitles.english: Are we using that?

subtitles.original: あ、チョコ、それダメ！
subtitles.english: Ah, Choco, not that!

subtitles.original: え、これダメなの？
subtitles.english: Eh, I can't use this?

subtitles.original: そこは本編で使うの。
subtitles.english: That's for the main part of the stream.

subtitles.original: あ、何？
subtitles.english: Ah, what?

subtitles.original: そっか、本編か！
subtitles.english: Oh, right, the main part!

subtitles.original: ちょっとね、ベッドとか、ちょっといろいろ...
subtitles.english: Well, you know, with the bed and stuff...

subtitles.original: 撮影会とか、シチュエーションドラマとかやろうかなって...
subtitles.english: I was thinking of doing a photo session and a situation drama...

subtitles.original: シチュエーションドラマ！
subtitles.english: A situation drama!

subtitles.original: とんでもないことしようとしてる！
subtitles.english: She's planning something crazy!

subtitles.original: そうなんですよ。
subtitles.english: That's right.

subtitles.original: まあね、それは置いておいて。
subtitles.english: Well, setting that aside for now.

subtitles.original: 今回は、二人に撮影をしてもらいたいので。
subtitles.english: I want you two to take some photos of me today.

subtitles.original: まずは...
subtitles.english: First...

subtitles.original: 分かりました！
subtitles.english: Understood!

subtitles.original: 撮りますよ、よいしょ。
subtitles.english: Let's take some photos. There we go.

subtitles.original: ラミィ様には、こちら！
subtitles.english: For Lamy-sama, this!

subtitles.original: 本格的な！すごいカメラ来た！
subtitles.english: A professional one! A great camera is here!

subtitles.original: そして、ノエル様にはこちらの、じゃじゃーん！
subtitles.english: And for Noel-sama, this one. Ta-da!

subtitles.original: なんだいこれ？
subtitles.english: What is this?

subtitles.original: チョコのギリギリを守るために、特別に作られたモザイク棒です！
subtitles.english: It's a mosaic stick specially made to protect Choco's 'edge'!

subtitles.original: 特別すぎる！すごいの来た、モザイク！
subtitles.english: That's too special! Something amazing came, a mosaic!

subtitles.original: ボタンで、このモザイクの粗さを変えれるらしい！
subtitles.english: Apparently, you can change the intensity of the mosaic with a button!

subtitles.original: 今めっちゃ粗くなってるから。
subtitles.english: It's really coarse right now.

subtitles.original: あ、本当だ、薄くできる！本当だ！
subtitles.english: Ah, you're right, it can be made thinner! It's true!

subtitles.original: すげえ、でも粗いほうがむしろいいまである、これ。
subtitles.english: Amazing, but the coarse one might even be better.

subtitles.original: 確かに。オッケー、隠すよ！
subtitles.english: True. Okay, I'll hide it!

subtitles.original: これ大丈夫かな、でも配信ね、ちょっと守りますよ。
subtitles.english: Is this okay? I'll protect the stream though.

subtitles.original: チョコの配信を守ってください！頑張ります！
subtitles.english: Please protect Choco's stream! I'll do my best!

subtitles.original: それでは、撮影会スタート！イエーイ！
subtitles.english: Now, let's start the photo session! Yay!

subtitles.original: まずはやっぱり全身。
subtitles.english: First, a full-body shot as expected.

subtitles.original: そうだね、そうだよね。
subtitles.english: Right, definitely.

subtitles.original: 普通に、こうね、ポーズ、いつものチョコ先の。
subtitles.english: Normally, like this, the usual Choco-sen pose.

subtitles.original: あー！美しい、うわー！
subtitles.english: Ah! Beautiful, wow!

subtitles.original: 美しい！あー、いいいい、いいよ！
subtitles.english: Beautiful! Ah, good, good, that's it!

subtitles.original: 可愛い！もうここちょっとまずいんじゃない？これ。
subtitles.english: So cute! Isn't this already a bit risky?

subtitles.original: まずいかな？あ、逆に、逆に！
subtitles.english: Is it bad? Ah, on the contrary, on the contrary!

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って、ノリノリなんですけど！
subtitles.english: Wait a second, she's really into it!

subtitles.original: まずいかな？ちょっとね。
subtitles.english: Is it bad? Just a little.

subtitles.original: ここ、揺れて、モザイクが！モザイクが追いついてない！
subtitles.english: It's shaking here, the mosaic! The mosaic can't keep up!

subtitles.original: ノエル様、頑張って頑張って！
subtitles.english: Noel-sama, hang in there, hang in there!

subtitles.original: こうやってね、こういう感じで、うんうん。
subtitles.english: Like this, in this way, yeah, yeah.

subtitles.original: ちょっとジャンプしてもらってみてもいいですか？
subtitles.english: Can you try jumping for a bit?

subtitles.original: ジャンプ、確かに。すごい、プルッ...
subtitles.english: Jumping, true. Amazing, wobble...

subtitles.original: あ、やばい！めっちゃ揺れてる、あかん、あかん、これ！
subtitles.english: Ah, no! It's shaking so much, no, no, this is bad!

subtitles.original: ちょっとせっかくだから、椅子とかも座っちゃう？
subtitles.english: Since we're at it, why don't you sit on the chair?

subtitles.original: 椅子ね、ここにありますね。はーい、よいしょ。
subtitles.english: The chair, it's right here. Okay, there we go.

subtitles.original: あ、いいいね！靴も可愛い！
subtitles.english: Ah, nice! The shoes are cute too!

subtitles.original: なんかちょっと青っぽいんだね。
subtitles.english: It looks a bit bluish.

subtitles.original: そう、チョコね、そこが赤なの。
subtitles.english: Yeah, for Choco, that part is red.

subtitles.original: えー！あ、ちょっと、ま、ま...
subtitles.english: Eh! Ah, wait, m-m...

subtitles.original: まずい、ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Risky, thank you very much!

subtitles.original: そこがね、赤なの、これ。ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: That part is red, you see. Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: 大丈夫、あ、でも中見えてないからね。大丈夫です。
subtitles.english: It's okay, ah, but nothing's visible inside. It's okay.

subtitles.original: セーフです！守ってます、チャンネル守ってます！
subtitles.english: Safe! I'm protecting it, protecting the channel!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、こう、どんどん、どんどん、上を見てもらって。
subtitles.english: Then, let's gradually look at the upper body.

subtitles.original: あ、いいいね！あ、可愛い！
subtitles.english: Ah, nice! Ah, so cute!

subtitles.original: 見えてる？見えてるよ、見えてるよ！うん。
subtitles.english: Can you see? I can see, I can see! Yeah.

subtitles.original: 見えてる？あ、可愛い！可愛いね、おー！
subtitles.english: Can you see? Ah, so cute! You're cute, oh!

subtitles.original: え、ちなみにラミィさん、あれですよ。
subtitles.english: Eh, by the way, Lamy-san, there's that.

subtitles.original: この椅子に座って先生ポーズも、あ、先生ポーズ！
subtitles.english: Sitting on this chair for a teacher pose... Ah, teacher pose!

subtitles.original: 撮ってほしい、先生ポーズ。
subtitles.english: I want a photo of the teacher pose.

subtitles.original: 先生ポーズって何だ？こんな感じ？
subtitles.english: What's a teacher pose? Like this?

subtitles.original: あー、いい！いいですね、いい、非常にいい！
subtitles.english: Ah, nice! It's good, very good!

subtitles.original: これもうモザイクいらないね、これは。非常に、非常に。
subtitles.english: We don't need the mosaic for this. Very, very nice.

subtitles.original: 本当にいらないのか、これ？いや、わかんない、わかんない。
subtitles.english: Do we really not need it? Well, I don't know, I don't know.

subtitles.original: チョコ先の魅力が溢れすぎてて、いいですね！
subtitles.english: Choco-sen's charm is overflowing, it's great!

subtitles.original: 素晴らしい！え、じゃあ団長もいいですか？何、何？
subtitles.english: Wonderful! Eh, then is it okay for Dancho too? What, what?

subtitles.original: お尻フリフリをちょっと、していただきたいんで。
subtitles.english: I'd like you to do a little hip wiggle.

subtitles.original: フリフリ、えーと、そう、後ろ向いてもらって。
subtitles.english: Wiggle, um, yeah, turn around please.

subtitles.original: 白衣越しだけど。フリフリ、あ、いいね、フリフリ！
subtitles.english: Even through the white coat. Wiggle, ah, nice, wiggle!

subtitles.original: 白衣越しだが、その下に、あ、ちょっと、その下に！
subtitles.english: It's through the white coat, but underneath... Ah, wait, underneath!

subtitles.original: スカート結構際どい！でもこれ、うん、白衣ってこれ...
subtitles.english: The skirt is quite risky! But this, yeah, the white coat...

subtitles.original: 脱げ、脱いでほしいんだけど、これ脱げないの？
subtitles.english: Take it off, I want you to take it off, but can't you?

subtitles.original: 脱げるけど、本編でって言ってた。
subtitles.english: I can, but I said that's for the main part.

subtitles.original: あ、本編なら脱いでくれるんですね！あー！
subtitles.english: Ah, so you'll take it off in the main part! Ah!

subtitles.original: ガニ股、あのココ会長リスペクトで、ガニ股好きなんで。
subtitles.english: The bow-legged pose, out of respect for Coco-kaicho, I like it.

subtitles.original: はい！ガニ股ー！いいいね！
subtitles.english: Yes! Bow-legged pose! Nice!

subtitles.original: ガニ股助かる！ガニ股ー！
subtitles.english: Bow-legged pose is a lifesaver! Bow-legged!

subtitles.original: これちょっとモザイク、モザイク！あ、見えてるもん、あ！
subtitles.english: A little mosaic here, mosaic! Ah, something's visible, ah!

subtitles.original: モザイクお願いします！モザイクが、無効か！
subtitles.english: Mosaic please! Is the mosaic ineffective?!

subtitles.original: 逆にやばい！やばい、やばい、やばい、やばい！
subtitles.english: On the contrary, it's bad! Bad, bad, bad, bad!

subtitles.original: 可愛い、ふうー。どんどんいこう、どんどんいこう。
subtitles.english: Cute, whew. Let's keep going, keep going.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、ラストはやっぱりアイドルだからさ、チョコ先。
subtitles.english: Then, for the last one, since you're an idol, Choco-sen.

subtitles.original: アイドル、とびきり可愛いアイドルお願いします！
subtitles.english: An idol, please show us your most adorable idol pose!

subtitles.original: はい！え、可愛い！
subtitles.english: Yes! Eh, so cute!

subtitles.original: いやこれ、あ、いいいね！フフフ。
subtitles.english: No, this... ah, nice! Hehehe.
